dev.jeka.core.api.file

Class JkPathMatcher

  • java.lang.Object
    • dev.jeka.core.api.file.JkPathMatcher
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.nio.file.PathMatcher

    public final class JkPathMatcher
extends java.lang.Object
implements java.nio.file.PathMatcher
    A collection of PathMatcher commonly used each associated with a label for human recognising.

      • of

        public static JkPathMatcher of(boolean positive,
                               java.nio.file.FileSystem fileSystem,
                               java.lang.Iterable<java.lang.String> globPatterns)
        A matcher accepting/refusing if path matches at least one of the specified glob patterns within specified file system.
        Parameters:
        positive - If true matcher will accept files matching at least one of the specified patterns. If false matcher will accept files matching none of the specified pattern.
